important_warning: Candidate layer. active_openings_count is null until live-validated; null means NOT YET VALIDATED, never zero. Counts are uncapped.
open_roles_count_semantics: Per-company source totals are uncapped. Only sample_job_titles/job_listing_urls are bounded for report size.
recommended_pipeline: company -> careers page -> ATS/source mapping -> active jobs -> count exactness -> drift report. Promote source_openings_total/source_openings_exact only after an exact source resolves.
